title: Simple Drills
description: This is a simple mod that adds Tier Based Drills
body:
Simple Drills

This is a simple mod that adds Tier Based Drills.
There are 6 Drills in this mod (Copper, Gold, Iron, Amethyst, Diamond, Netherite, Sculk, Emerald, Multi Drill)
All the drills do is mine in a 3x3 tunnel to make strip mining or excavating easier.

Fabric API is Required to be able to use Fabric Versions of Simple Drills

Modify the radius the drill mines with the gamerule "drillRadius" (Versions 1.6 and above)

Crafting Recipe Example, any Wooden Planks work, I would recommend mods like "Just Enough Items" to view all of the recipes

Netherite Drill Recipe (Mod versions above 1.6.1)

The Tiers 

Yes, you may add this mod to any Modpack. Both for Personal and Commercial use.
